title: Fix Start Game flow and ESC pause menu behavior

requirements.text: When the player clicks 'Start Game' from the main menu, the game must launch directly into active gameplay with the pause overlay closed and no ESC/pause menu visible.

quotes: wenn man im spielhauptmenü ist und start game klickt kommt man direkt ins spiel ohne das das ESC menü offen ist

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'Start Game' from MainMenu transitions immediately to the game screen with PauseOverlay hidden.
No pause state is active when the game first starts.
The player can move and interact immediately upon entering the game.

requirements.text: During active gameplay, pressing the ESC key must pause the game and display the PauseOverlay. The game must remain paused (enemies frozen, timers stopped) until the player explicitly clicks the resume button, which dismisses the overlay and resumes gameplay.

quotes: wenn man im spiel ESC drückt dann pausiert das spiel bis man fortsetzt

acceptanceCriteria: Pressing ESC during active gameplay sets a paused state to true and renders the PauseOverlay.
While paused, enemy movement, wave timers, and player actions are frozen.
Clicking the resume button in PauseOverlay sets paused state to false and resumes all game systems.
Pressing ESC again while paused resumes the game (toggle behavior).
ESC key has no effect on the pause menu when the player is in the main menu or game-over screen.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Reuse the existing PauseOverlay component; do not create a new pause UI component.
nonGoals: Redesigning or restyling the PauseOverlay component.
Adding new pause menu options (settings, quit, etc.) beyond what already exists.
